name: lmhead12k-int4head
description: lmhead12k with an int4-quantized pruned head: public W4A16 (int4) Gemma-4-E4B with lm_head weight rows pruned to the same frozen 12,288 kept ids as lmhead12k_empirical, but the pruned head is quantized to int4 W4A16 (group_size 128, pack-quantized) and served through the same compressed-tensors Marlin GEMV as the body. Untied embed_tokens stay full bf16; the lm_head per-token read drops ~62.9 MB bf16 -> ~16 MB int4 (~4x head-byte cut) on top of the row prune.
